name: Roy Wood Jr.
blurb: He blends sharp social and political observation with a storyteller's warmth, and has released the Comedy Central specials Father Figure, No One Loves You, and Imperfect Messenger.
bio: Roy Wood Jr. is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and writer who broke through as a correspondent on The Daily Show from 2015 to 2023. He blends sharp social and political observation with a storyteller's warmth, and has released the Comedy Central specials Father Figure, No One Loves You, and Imperfect Messenger. He hosted the 2023 White House Correspondents Dinner and the American adaptation of Have I Got News for You.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up at 19, opening for Tommy Davidson
Finishes third on NBC's Last Comic Standing
Joins The Daily Show as a correspondent
First Comedy Central special, Father Figure
No One Loves You becomes network's top-rated stand-up premiere
Begins hosting CNN's Have I Got News for You

accolades: Entertainment Weekly 12 Rising Stars of Comedy (2008)
No One Loves You: highest-rated original stand-up premiere on Comedy Central

movies_tv.t: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
